untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of bid/ask spread dynamics, transitory spread components, and directional order flow imbalance (bid-to-ask vs ask-to-bid jumps). These microstructure features are not available in the allowed indicator set. ATR was used as a proxy for spread magnitude, but cannot capture: (1) actual bid/ask spread levels, (2) directional price jumps relative to spread, (3) midpoint reversion mechanics, (4) transitory vs permanent spread components. A proper implementation requires tick-level order book data and spread decomposition.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally incompatible with OHLCV-based backtesting. Requires: real-time bid/ask quotes, order flow classification, spread state machine, and tick-by-tick execution. ATR_14 was used as crude proxy for volatility/spread magnitude only. Entry/exit thresholds are placeholders and require domain-specific microstructure data to be meaningful.
